title: Permutation Generator
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Python code that generates all permutations of a given list of integers. The code should recursively use a depth-first search (DFS) approach to find all possible permutations. The generated code should include a method to print each permutation.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct Python syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (Python syntax and recursive function definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive DFS algorithm for generating permutations.
